title: FilterViewsByType
description: FilterViewsByType: IRequest that filters all views of given type.

RevitViewType.description: RevitViewType enum correspondent to Revit view type. RevitViewType: Enumerator defining view type of Revit view. A clone of Autodesk.Revit.DB.ViewType enum.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
